hero.title: Integrity Is Non-Negotiable.
hero.subtitle: Confidential. Anonymous. Protected. Every report is reviewed by our independent compliance team, because silence is never an option.

intro.text: At GSI, integrity, transparency, and accountability are fundamental to how we operate. If you are aware of misconduct, unethical behavior, or violations of laws or company policies, we encourage you to report it.
intro.confidential: You may report concerns confidentially or anonymously. All reports are taken seriously and reviewed by our compliance team.
intro.noRetaliation: Retaliation against anyone who raises concerns in good faith is strictly prohibited.

reportable.title: What Can Be Reported
reportable.subtitle: You can report any behavior that may violate laws, regulations, or company policies, including:
items: Theft or misuse of company assets
Violations of regulatory or legal obligations
reportable.unsure: If you are unsure whether something should be reported, you can still submit a report.

protection.title: Your Identity Stays in the Shadows.
protection.subtitle: You will never be exposed. Our systems are designed so that the truth can surface, without you ever having to.
items: Submit fully anonymous reports. No account, no trace.
Your identity is encrypted and shielded at every layer
Zero-tolerance retaliation policy, enforced without exception
Every case reviewed by an independent compliance authority
protection.warning: Retaliation of any kind triggers immediate disciplinary proceedings. No warnings. No exceptions.

form.title: Submit a Report
form.subtitle: You may submit a report through the secure form below.

fields.anonymous: Do you want to remain anonymous?

form.success: Your report has been received. Our compliance team will review it promptly.
form.error: There was an error submitting your report. Please try again.

process.title: What Happens Next

step1.title: Report Received
step1.text: Your report is received by the GSI Compliance Team.

step2.title: Case Review
step2.text: The case is reviewed and assessed for validity.

step3.title: Investigation
step3.text: If necessary, a confidential investigation is initiated.

step4.title: Resolution
step4.text: Appropriate actions are taken based on findings.

process.followUp: You may receive follow-up questions if contact information is provided.

emergency.title: Emergency Situations
emergency.text: If the situation involves immediate danger or criminal activity, please contact local authorities before submitting a report.

commitment.title: Compliance Commitment
commitment.text: GSI is committed to maintaining the highest ethical standards in all operations. Speaking up helps protect our employees, customers, and partners.
